min-target.$description: dimension used by the option component for min target.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the option component for padding inline.

radius.$description: dimension used by the option component for radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the option component for font size.

bg.$description: color used by the option component for rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the option component for rest foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the option component for hover background.

fg.$description: color used by the option component for hover foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the option component for highlight background.

fg.$description: color used by the option component for highlight foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the option component for selected background.

fg.$description: color used by the option component for selected foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the option component for disabled background.

fg.$description: color used by the option component for disabled foreground.
